questionHtml:
A sound wave travels through a gas at a speed of 270 m s−1. The graph shows the variation of the displacement s of the gas particles with distance d from the source.

What is the frequency of the wave?


A.  180 Hz

B.  360 Hz

C.  450 Hz

D.  900 Hz
